question: In the above data, which user is represented most often? Give your final answer in the form 'User: [X]', where [X] is the user ID.
context_window_text:
The following lines contain 388 general-knowledge questions, one per line. Each question has an answer that can be described as one of 6 categories: 'abbreviation', 'entity', 'location', 'description and abstract concept', 'human being', 'numeric value'.

You will be asked to answer questions about the aggregate label statistics across all 388 examples in this dataset. Do not try to guess, estimate, or approximate the result. Calculate the exact answer given these datapoints.
